creator: antiduh@gmail.com
text:
When I last tested this, `make check-plist` failed without this change to the plist:

> -%%DRUPAL_BASE%%/modules/help/help.api.php

I just redownloaded the source and indeed, that file is still missing:

> angst(/usr/ports/www/drupal7/work/drupal-7.31/modules/help) # ll
> total 22
> -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   133B Aug  6 13:14 help-rtl.css
> -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   2.5K Aug  6 13:14 help.admin.inc
> -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   138B Aug  6 13:14 help.css
> -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   254B Aug  6 13:33 help.info
> -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   4.2K Aug  6 13:14 help.module
> -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   4.4K Aug  6 13:14 help.test
> 

And indeed, that file is still in the plist in svn:

> # svn revert pkg-plist
> Reverted 'pkg-plist'
> # cat pkg-plist | grep help.api
> %%DRUPAL_BASE%%/modules/help/help.api.php
